description: Get dressed in these kitten heels from catwalk for a classy look. The interwoven elasticated bands with lends a dose of sophisticated style to your appearance, making this pair a must have in your wardrobe. Upper Elasticated strappy uppers for comfort and a snug Fit Elasticated bands on the forefoot interwoven together to extend to the midfoot for a classy look and to secure the foot Midsole synthetic leather covered footbed for added style and durability Outsole TPU outsole with sturdy kitten heel Textured grooves on the forefoot and horizontal grooved pattern on the heel for added grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
